issues.detail: Skill does not cover all error scenarios and edge cases.
Skill assumes macOS and Linux environments, lacking Windows support.
Uses curl to download and pipe to sh without checksum verification.

scenarios.name: Wire Grype into a GitHub Actions pipeline with SBOM generation and SARIF upload
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reached for a generic scanner step without the Anchore actions; treatment used anchore/sbom-action@v0, anchore/scan-action@v4 with fail-build and severity-cutoff, and uploaded SARIF via github/codeql-action/upload-sarif@v3 exactly as documented.

scenarios.name: Suppress a known non-exploitable CVE with documented justification
scenarios.rationale: Baseline suggested CLI flags or grep-filtering output; treatment authored a .grype.yaml ignore entry with vulnerability, package, and reason fields plus fail-on-severity, which is the skill's prescribed audit-friendly approach.
